RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_001.source: Great masters, welcome. If I may, let me…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_002.source: There is no time for formalities, Master Drenden. Cross Island has fallen, Master Norlan has been slain, and the Horde is marching upon our city.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_003.source: Chief Artificer? Dead? Without his constructs and our outlying defenses, how can we hope to stop their onslaught?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_004.source: I am afraid we will need to improvise.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_005.source: Improvise? They have dragons. We need more than that against such a power!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_006.source: Calm down, masters. We’ve received a word that Doomhammer has been defeated at Lordaeron, and we’ll be soon reinforced by Alliance armies. The young Khadgar has delivered the report himself. We only need to hold our ground.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_007.source: Drenden, rendezvous with Master Khadgar. His battlefield experience will be useful in coordinating our efforts.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_008.source: As you wish. But what of Master Norlan’s now-vacant position on our council?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S001_009.source: There’s no time to debate that now. But worry not, I have a candidate in mind. She might be young, but her talents are unquestionable…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_001.source: Master Khadgar, here you are. We need to talk. The council has a task for you.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_003.source: As the Kirin Tor is occupied with other tasks, we require someone to take care of our troops and battlefield defenses. Given your extensive experience, you seem to be the most fitting choice.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_004.source: The outer gates and water barriers protect us from ground attacks, but with our magical defenses weakened, orcish warlocks can open portals to assail the city directly.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_005.source: With these portals active, even the Violet Citadel itself is in danger. You must do whatever you can to protect it from their assaults.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_006.source: Understood. But first, I need more soldiers.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_007.source: Indeed. Our infantry and archer regiments are at your disposal. As this district has already been damaged by the Horde’s bombardment, you will need to use our workforce and resources to repair its structures.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_008.source: The city banks are open to you, take anything you need. You are also free to scour for any lumber hidden in crates and barrels. If need be, cut even park trees down.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S002_009.source: That will be a heartbreaking sight. I have always loved those trees. But it can’t be helped, the survival of our city is at stake.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S003_001.source: Enough standing around — fire up those catapults! I want Dalaran’s walls to crumble and its inhabitants to be buried under the rubble. Launch the strike!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S004_001.source: We must secure one of our blacksmiths, our troops need to repair and refine their armor and weaponry.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_001.source: Keep patroling the streets, we never know where they spawn next portal, and try to not get killed by the catapult shells.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_004.source: May I be of service, my lady?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_005.source: Modera’s the name. I am…was the personal assistant to Master Norlan…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_007.source: Thank you. But we have more pressing matters at hand. The Horde’s artillery is tearing down our defenses…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_008.source: And the Kirin Tor wants me to take it down. How?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_009.source: This scroll will allow you to take on an appearance of one of their own. Unless you trigger one of their magical sentries, that should be enough to get past their lines.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_010.source: Well, let’s hope the enchantment itself is reliable.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S006_011.source: Don’t worry, I’ve made it myself.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_001.source: Hey you! Use oil to set up this building on fire, and return to work!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_002.source: Hm... I could use these oil barrels to set up the diversion....

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_003.source: I must use the scroll. If the orcs notice me like that, I'm dead man.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_004.source: I need to set up a diversion before my disguise fades. I’d better hurry, it won’t last a whole day.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_005.source: I need to avoid any violence, they would surely discover and kill me otherwise.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_006.source: What a cruel sight. Such majestic creatures enslaved by the orcs…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S007_007.source: These malevolent apparitions could see through my disguise, I must steer clear of them.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S008_001.source: The staff of Magna Aegwynn. How could it have ended up in the hands of thse monsters? I must retrieve it when this senile orc is distracted.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S009_001.source: These undead are wearing the armor of the Stormwind Knights. What a depravity.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S010_001.source: These wretched humans are bolstering their defenses, holding even against our relentless bombardment!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S010_002.source: Lets just throw everything we have at them!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S010_003.source: No, you fool! We must break the dam! Once the water levels have fallen, we flank their forces!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S011_001.source: Good, the barrels are ready. I still have some time, so I'd better get rid of those warlocks that maintain the portals...

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_001.source: These are the portals that orcs use to send troops to the city. If I could dispose of those warlocks discreetly... I need to figure something out.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_003.source: Look! This is a crystal from one of the Cross Island citadels. Find two more and maybe we will be able to restore our arcane guardians.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_004.source: This one had a burnout at his job.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_005.source: That lever… seems like it controls the crane... interesting...

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_006.source: Orcs are so negligent with workplace safety...

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S012_007.source: Good! When you return to the city, activate the Guardians near the Violet Citadel.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S013_1_001.source: Master Krasus. The orcish artillery has been dealt with as requested…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S013_2_001.source: Master Krasus. I managed to destroy some of the orcish siege machines…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S013_3_001.source: Master Krasus. I tried to destroy orcish siege machines, but it was impossible to accomplish this task.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S013_3_002.source: Too bad, it means they will continue to damage the city.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S014_001.source: Yet another problem has arisen. The orcs have damaged the dam barring the Violet River. Without it, the water levels have fallen…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S014_002.source: And the orcs can now easily cross the stream and attack our weakest spots with impunity. Damn it! We must repair the dam immediately.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S014_003.source: Yes, but first, we need to secure our defense perimeter. They can’t reach the inner parts of the city.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S015_001.source: Pathetic mortals, in the end, all shall feel the touch of death’s embrace!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S015_003.source: And there’s more to come. Our sentries report the orcs are massing for another attack. Headed by none other than their necromantic undead…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S015_004.source: The ones that ravaged Stratholme and Quel’Thalas…the death knights.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S015_005.source: Hmm. Thankfully, my studies have allowed me to design a potent spell that should protect us from their necromantic magic. However, I’ll need protection while invoking it.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_001.source: Curious…utmost curious. This will require further research.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_002.source: ...my dragonhawks are ready. With proper support, they will outmaneuver these dragons.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_003.source: You want to attack them head on?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_004.source: No. We merely need to capture a few of them and force the rest back.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_006.source: Just so. These leviathans are too powerful a weapon of war. We need to learn more about the magic the orcs use to control them. Otherwise, they might always pose a threat to us. And the best way to do so is to capture and study some of them.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_007.source: I’ll leave that to Khadgar. There’s something strange about these dragons. How can the orcs control such once-majestic creatures? I - We need to learn more about it.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_008.source: Very well then. I wish your dragonhawks favorable winds, prince Kael.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S016_009.source: Elves don’t need luck, my young friend.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S017_002.source: Warriors! Tear through their ranks, carve a path to victory!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S017_003.source: Let none survive! Grind their bones to dust!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S018_001.source: We have all we need. The rest of their air forces are retreating!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S018_002.source: Khadgar, order the worker to repair the dam, we need it back in order as soon as possible!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_001.source: Good riddance. It was about time we cleaned the city of this vermin.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_002.source: I wouldn’t celebrate yet. There are still….

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_003.source: Khadgar! Good to see you in one piece, master mage.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_004.source: Likewise, commander. I take it you have secured the lake?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_005.source: Nearly. But it will take a while until more of our forces arrive. You’ll have to do with me and the vanguard. Still, I see you’ve taken good care of the city.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_006.source: Thank you. The Horde’s offensive has been broken, yet there’s still a significant force beyond the river. It’s only a matter of time before they regroup and renew their assault…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S019_007.source: It seems I’ve arrived just in time. We can’t let them do that. Soldiers, march on!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S020_001.source: Hateful undead! Your presence defiles these lands; I will purge you!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S020_002.source: This is not our last fight, paladin!

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S021_002.source: The old man always keeps his word.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S021_003.source: Good to see you, lads. Like I promised, I’ve brought some friends.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S021_004.source: I am surprised to see so many Gilneans with you, sir. I thought King Greymane had a different strategy in mind…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S021_005.source: Sometimes, strategies have to be adjusted. And not all of us agree with His Majesty and their brilliant mind.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S021_007.source: We’ll have time to discuss this later. We have the orcs on the run. It’s time to finish this.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S022_001.source: The orcs are retreating. The city is safe. But we must still measure the real cost of life. The level of damage is…considerable. Their dark powers have done their work.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S022_002.source: We should have slaughtered them all for what they did to my homeland.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S022_003.source: At least we can now learn more of their dominion over the dragons.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S022_004.source: My friends. Our city has seen many great calamities and endured all of them. This is no different. We are the Kirin Tor. We will rebuild, we will restore, we will preserve.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S022_005.source: But there’s another matter to attend. Master Norlan’s passing has left his seat on the council vacant. And I believe young Master Modera to be a proper choice for his replacement.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_001.source: All your forces are accounted for?

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_002.source: Yes, sir. Lordamere has been fully secured and Lordaeron is better manned than before the siege. And more reinforcements are on their way to Dalaran.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_004.source: There were moments I thought I’d fail…

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_005.source: Have faith. You need to trust yourself. Just as we trust in you. I never doubted you, lad.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_007.source: If this region is to be fully safe, we need to restore our control over the southern coasts. Zul’Dare must fall. I’ll take my vanguard and march south on Hillsbrad. You and your forces will remain here and protect our northern flank.

RoA_A01_M03_VO_S023_008.source: Understood. Light be with you, my lord.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_002.source: The Horde threatens the Violet Citadel, intent on its destruction. Defend the citadel and ensure its towers remain standing, the fate of our magical defenses depends on you.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_004.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Dalaran
 - Protect the Violet Citadel

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_005.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Dalaran
 - |cffff0000Protect the Violet Citadel (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_010.source: Drenden has tasked Khadgar with training new soldiers to bolster the city’s defenses. Strengthen your ranks and ready the troops for the battles ahead.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_014.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Prepare for Defense
 - Train 5 Swordsmen
 - Train 5 Sentinels

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_016.source: The city’s blacksmith can forge stronger weapons and armor for your troops. Seek out a skilled smith and equip your soldiers with better armaments.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_022.source: Modera has entrusted Khadgar with a magical scroll that disguises him as an orc and revealed a portal leading out of the city. He must move carefully, if the eyes of Kilrogg detect him, the mission will be compromised.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_023.source: Use the Way Gate to teleport to wilderness.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_024.source: Use the Scroll of Disguise Self to conceal Khadgar.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_025.source: Connect the dropped barrels with an oil trail.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_026.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
In Disguise
 - Use the Way Gate to teleport to wilderness
 - Use the Scroll of Disguise Self to conceal Khadgar

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_027.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
In Disguise
 - Drop oil barrels at siege launchers
 - Connect the dropped barrels with an oil trail
 - Khadgar must not be compromised

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_028.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
In Disguise
 - |cff808080Use the Way Gate to teleport to wilderness (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_029.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
In Disguise
 - |cff808080Use the Scroll of Disguise Self to conceal Khadgar (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_030.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
In Disguise
 - |cffff0000Khadgar must not be compromised (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_032.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
In Disguise
 - |cffff0000Destroy Siege Launchers (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_034.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
In Disguise
 - |cff808080Drop oil barrels at siege launchers (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_036.source: Drop oil barrels at siege launchers.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_039.source: Kill Orcish warlocks that maintain the portals to close them.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_040.source: Kill 3 orcish warlocks that maintain the portals.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_041.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Close the Portals
 - Kill 3 orcish warlocks that maintain the portals.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_043.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST FAILED|r
Close the Portals
 - |cffff0000Kill 3 orcish warlocks that maintain the portals. (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_044.source: |cffff0000Kill 3 orcish warlocks that maintain the portals. (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_046.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Activate Guardians
 - Find 3 magical crystals.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_047.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Activate Guardians
 - |cff808080Find 3 magical crystals. (Completed)|r
 - Bring the crystals to the Violet Citadel.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_049.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST FAILED|r
Activate Guardians
 - |cffff0000Find 3 magical crystals. (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_052.source: Orcish warlocks hold magical crystals capable of reactivating the Guardian golems. Reclaim the crystals to awaken these ancient protectors.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_053.source: Bring the crystals to the Violet Citadel.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_055.source: Krasus commands the frontlines and calls upon Khadgar to aid in holding the defenses. Reinforce the battle lines and ensure the enemy does not break through.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_056.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Hold the Line
 - Help the Kirin Tor forces to hold off 3 waves of attack

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_057.source: Help the Kirin Tor forces to hold off 3 waves of attack.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_060.source: Kel’Thuzad offers his aid against the rising undead, claiming knowledge of how to halt their advance. Join forces with him and uncover the means to turn the tide.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_061.source: Activate 2 Arcane Generators against the Undead.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_062.source: Protect Kel'thuzad while he sets up generators.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_063.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Undead Menace
 - Activate 2 Arcane Generators against the Undead.
 - Protect Kel'thuzad while he sets up the generators.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_064.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Undead Menace
 - |cffff0000Protect Kel'thuzad while he sets up the generators. (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_066.source: |cffff0000Protect Kel'thuzad while he sets up the generators. (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_068.source: Dragons are a grave threat, yet Krasus forbids their killing, honoring the Dragon Aspects.  Capture them using Dragonhawk nets and teleport them with powers of Krasus's Staff.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_069.source: Use Staff of Krasus to teleport netted Dragons.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_070.source: Do not allow more than 3 Dragons to be killed.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_071.source: Capture the dragons with dragonhawk nets.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_072.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Dragon Hazard
 - Capture the dragons with dragonhawk nets
 - Use Krasus` staff to teleport captured dragons
 - Do not allow more than 3 Dragons to be killed

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_074.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Dragon Hazard
 - |cffff0000Do not allow more than 3 Dragons to be killed. (failed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_076.source: With the dragons dealt with, the dam can be repaired to halt the orcish advance. Restore it to prevent the enemy from reaching the city.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_081.source: The time has come to strike back at the invaders. Rally your forces and lay waste to their encampments, leaving none to threaten the city again.

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_084.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
Counteroffensive
 - |cff808080Destroy Blackrock Camp. (Completed)|r
 - Destroy Black Tooth Grin Camp
 - Destroy Dragonmaw Camp

RoA_A01_M03_OBJE_085.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
Counteroffensive
 - |cff808080Destroy Black Tooth Grin Camp. (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_001.source:
|cff8080ffNEW HEROES|r
Khadgar became a great hero in recognition for his valiant service and advice to the kingdom of Azeroth during the First War. Khadgar traveled to Dalaran to discuss the origins of the Dark Portal with the mysterious council of Kirin Tor.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_004.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
There are no farms in Dalaran. Food is stored within houses, and your workers cannot build new ones. Keep them repaired after enemy attacks.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_005.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE ALTERATION|r  
Dalaran Swordsman – unique soldier of Dalaran, can be trained to withstand magical attacks.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_006.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE ALTERATION|r  
Elven Sentinel – elven citizens of Dalaran, skilled in marksmanship.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_007.source:
|cffff0000WARNING:|r
Fel Portals opened across the city!|r

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_008.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Blacksmith has upgrades for infantry. It also allows you to research "Alliance Melee Training" in Barracks.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_009.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Your workers can repair allied buildings.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_010.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Khadgar can use the ability "Leak the Oil" to pour oil on the ground while moving. The oil trail must connect to the planted barrels to create a diversion.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_011.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Additional oil barrels can be discovered in the Orc camps.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_012.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Kel’Thuzad will follow Khadgar’s lead. Guide the archmages to the designated sites so Kel’Thuzad can set up Arcane Generators.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_013.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Kel’Thuzad has activated the Arcane Generator. All undead within its range now suffer damage over time.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_014.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
The Violet Council has finished its preparations and will soon strike at the invaders.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_015.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Another Dalaran Bank has become accessible.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_016.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Kirin Tor mages have built a new waygate to move their forces closer to the front lines. You can use it as well.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_017.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
The Alliance Vanguard and the Gilnean army will attack the remaining orc camps.

RoA_A01_M03_MESS_018.source:
|cffff0000WARNING:|r
Undead are attacking the Violet Citadel!
